# Test basic JSON Schema conversion
! exec jsonrpc2gostruct -help
stdout 'Usage'
stdout 'Options:'

# Create a simple schema file
cat > simple_schema.json << 'EOF'
{
  "type": "object",
  "description": "A simple test schema",
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "The name of the item"
    },
    "count": {
      "type": "integer",
      "description": "The count of items"
    },
    "active": {
      "type": "boolean",
      "description": "Whether the item is active"
    },
    "tags": {
      "type": "array",
      "description": "Tags associated with the item",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    }
  },
  "required": ["name", "active"]
}
EOF

# Process the schema file
exec jsonrpc2gostruct -package test simple_schema.json
stdout 'package test'
stdout 'Schema - A simple test schema'
stdout 'Active bool `json:"active"`'
stdout 'Name string `json:"name"`'
! stderr 'ERROR'

# Test with output file
exec jsonrpc2gostruct -package custom -out output.go simple_schema.json
! stdout .
stderr 'Output written to output.go'
exists output.go
grep 'package custom' output.go
grep 'Schema - A simple test schema' output.go
